zh.lifeSummary: 當Gladys verch Iorwerth於1255年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾利安米內時，她的父親Iorwerth "Foelddu" ap Griffri25歲，母親Tangwystl ferch Gruffydd31歲。她和Iorwerth Voel ap Iorwerth Fychan至少有8個兒子。她去世在英國威爾斯丹比爾利朗勒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gladys verch Iorwerth于1255年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾利安米內时，她的父亲Iorwerth "Foelddu" ap Griffri25岁，母亲Tangwystl ferch Gruffydd31岁。她和Iorwerth Voel ap Iorwerth Fychan至少有8个儿子。她去世在英国威尔斯丹比爾利朗勒。

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Gladys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old Welsh name Gwladus , which is of uncertain derivation. It has been quite widely used outside Wales since the beginning of the 20th century, but is now out of fashion.

en.lifeSummary: When Gladys verch Iorwerth was born in 1255, in Llanymynech, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Iorwerth "Foelddu" ap Griffri, was 25 and her mother, Tangwystl ferch Gruffydd, was 31. She had at least 8 sons with Iorwerth Voel ap Iorwerth Fychan. She died in Llangollen, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gladys verch Iorwerth est née en 1255, à Llanymynech, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Iorwerth "Foelddu" ap Griffri, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Tangwystl ferch Gruffydd, avait 31 ans. Elle a eu au moins 8 fils avec Iorwerth Voel ap Iorwerth Fychan. Elle est décédée à Llangollen, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gladys verch Iorwerth è nata il nel 1255 nel Llanymynech, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Iorwerth "Foelddu" ap Griffri, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Tangwystl ferch Gruffydd, aveva 31 anni. ja.lifeSummary: Gladys verch Iorwerthが1255年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアラニームイネチで生まれた時，父Iorwerth "Foelddu" ap Griffriは25歳，母Tangwystl ferch Gruffyddは31歳であった。彼女はIorwerth Voel ap Iorwerth Fychanとの間に少なくとも8人の息子をもうけた。彼女はイギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアランゴレンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gladys verch Iorwerth(이)가 1255년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 랜이미니치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Iorwerth "Foelddu" ap Griffri(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Tangwystl ferch Gruffydd(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 Iorwerth Voel ap Iorwerth Fychan(와)과 적어도 여덟 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르 랭렌에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gladys verch Iorwerth nasceu em 1255, em Llanymynech, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Iorwerth "Foelddu" ap Griffri, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Tangwystl ferch Gruffydd, tinha 31 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gladys verch Iorwerth родилась в 1255 г. в местности лланиминеч, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Iorwerth "Foelddu" ap Griffri было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Tangwystl ferch Gruffydd, 31. У неё было по крайней мере 8 сыновей от Iorwerth Voel ap Iorwerth Fychan. Она умерла в местности лланголлен, денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания.
